hooks.command: jq -e 'select(.tool_input.file_path // "" | contains("/darktable-ai-aid/src/"))' >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Code change detected under src/. Before finishing this turn, check whether docs/ (architecture.md, tag-namespace.md, data-formats.md, development.md) need updates and append a CHANGELOG.md entry if user-visible behavior changed."}}' || true
